basics.name: Katlego Magoro
basics.title: Full Stack Developer — Software, Test Quality Assurance and Data Engineering

objective: Hi I am Katlego Magoro, a Full Stack Developer. I build software that is reliable, practical, and grounded in real business needs, from backend services, testing, data engineering, and APIs to performant interfaces and quality-focused delivery pipelines.
summary:
I am a proactive Software Developer and Data Engineer with a strong foundation in Java, C#, Python, .NET, and C++. My expertise spans software and application development, web development, and data analysis, with a focus on technologies such as Blazor, JMeter, and Rest Assured. My experience also includes software quality engineering, emphasizing test automation and Agile methodologies using Selenium, Robot Framework, and CI/CD pipelines.

Currently at Expleo Group, I work across full-stack engineering, collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable, high-performance solutions. My role covers the full software development lifecycle from design and architecture to deployment and production support, while continuously aligning with evolving engineering trends and delivery practices.

Previously, I served as a Software Quality Engineer Intern and contributed to major testing initiatives, including POS and API-driven systems. I also worked on data-focused projects such as analysing the economic impacts of load shedding in South Africa. With a Diploma in ICT Application Development from Walter Sisulu University and a strong commitment to continuous learning, I aim to deliver software that is practical, reliable, and impactful.

experience.role: Full Stack .NET Developer and Embedded Systems Engineer
bullets: Lead full stack development using C#, .NET, ASP.NET Core, Blazor, EF Core, and SQL Server for enterprise-grade distributed systems.
Design, build, and maintain CI/CD pipelines across Azure DevOps Pipelines, GitHub Actions, and Jenkins, including self-hosted runners and deployment stages.
Monitor pipeline health, build statuses, and deployment dashboards to ensure reliable continuous delivery across environments.
Implement automated deployment workflows across build, test, and release stages with environment-specific configurations and rollback strategies.
Design and implement scalable RESTful and OData APIs with responsive front-end components using Razor, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Own system architecture, domain modelling, database design, indexing strategy, and performance optimisation using LINQ and EF Core.
Apply SOLID principles, clean architecture, and dependency injection to deliver maintainable, production-ready solutions.
Develop secure authentication and role-based access control across distributed systems.
Conduct code reviews, mentor junior developers, and enforce engineering standards in agile teams.
experience.keyWin: Promoted from Associate to Embedded Systems Developer within 2 years and took on architecture ownership, team mentoring, and end-to-end CI/CD engineering across Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, and Jenkins.

bullets: Developed full stack features in C#, .NET, Blazor Server, EF Core, and SQL Server for enterprise reporting and account management platforms.
Took end-to-end ownership of API integrations, database structures, reusable components, and UI improvements.
Optimised SQL queries and EF Core relationships, reducing load times across key reporting screens.
Integrated Salesforce through ELSA workflows to automate data synchronisation and improve internal portal functionality.
Contributed to CI/CD pipeline configuration in Azure DevOps and supported junior developers through reviews and technical guidance.
experience.keyWin: Delivered a Salesforce-ELSA integration that removed manual data entry across internal portals and saved hours of weekly team effort.

bullets: Led end-to-end QA across financial and retail systems in four African countries, ensuring reliability and compliance.
Built automated regression suites using Selenium (Java), Robot Framework, and RestAssured.
Integrated test automation into CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and Azure DevOps.
Performed API testing, compatibility testing, and functional validation in agile delivery cycles.
experience.keyWin: Achieved ISTQB CTFL with 77.5% while delivering full QA coverage across multi-country financial systems.

experience.org: Rivonia Circle Hackathon (in partnership with Geekulcha)
bullets: Participated in the Rivonia Circle Hackathon, hosted in partnership with Geekulcha at the Tshimologong Precinct.
Hacked on the 'South Africa 2.0' challenge — designing tech platforms and tools to drive digital community activism, policy engagement, and democratic participation.

experience.role: Software Developer Trainee — Samsung Innovation Campus
experience.org: Samsung Innovation Campus, in partnership with Walter Sisulu University
bullets: Led high-impact analysis of South Africa's load-shedding economic impact using Python, Pandas, and NumPy.
Built mobile and web applications using Android Studio (Java), Firebase, HTML, and CSS.
Featured by Samsung South Africa and Samsung Global Youth Day People in Tech publications.
Presented the cohort closing speech to Samsung and government leadership and later returned as a first-cohort representative for the 2024 graduation event.
experience.keyWin: Delivered a nationally visible data analysis project and was invited back as a first-cohort representative speaker.

experience.org: East London Industrial Development Zone (ELIDZ) Science and Technology Park Incubation Program
bullets: Won the ELIDZ ICT hackathon and helped secure R30,000 in prize funding and R100,000 incubation support.
Conducted data analysis and technical support to improve operational efficiency across community-facing projects.
Contributed research-backed insights to incubation projects focused on practical regional impact.
experience.keyWin: Part of the winning team that secured both immediate prize funding and incubation investment for continued development.

bullets: Involved in the formation and development of the IT Society at Walter Sisulu University's Komani Campus.
Assisted the President and board of directors in planning and executing social events and facilitating committee meetings.

projects.name: ELIDZ ICT Hackathon — Team Code Brigaders
projects.description: Won the East London IDZ Science and Technology Park ICT Hackathon Challenge (Nov 2021) as part of Team Code Brigaders, presenting a health application designed to improve the rate at which services are rendered in public clinics in rural areas. The win earned R30,000 and a 12-month incubation place with R100,000 in funding.

projects.name: PAICTA AgriSec Hackathon
projects.description: Led a team at the PAICTA Virtual Eastern Cape Youth Digital AgriSec Hackathon (Sep 2021), coordinating roadblocks, tracking progress, and presenting the team's project to the judging panel. Team placed 2nd out of 20 teams.

projects.name: Load-Shedding Economic Impact Analysis
projects.description: Analysed the economic effects of load-shedding on the South African economy as part of the Samsung Innovation Campus program, using Python, Pandas, NumPy, and web-crawled data.

education.degree: Advanced Diploma in Information Resource Management (Information Technology)
education.notes: Applied advanced information systems and data management concepts in real-world organisational contexts; strengthened software development through structured analysis, system modelling, and solution design.

education.degree: Diploma in Information and Communication Technology, specialising in Application Development
education.notes: 73% average, with distinctions in 7 of 12 modules.

certifications.name: ISTQB Foundation Level (CTFL)
certifications.issuer: Southern African Software Testing Qualifications Board (SASTQB)

certifications.name: Job Oriented — Practical Software QA Testing

highlights.title: ELIDZ Hackathon Win
highlights.description: Won the East London IDZ Science and Technology Park ICT Hackathon Challenge with Team Code Brigaders (Nov 2021), securing prize money and a year-long incubation place.

highlights.title: Samsung Innovation Campus — International Youth Day Feature
highlights.description: Featured globally by Samsung as part of their International Youth Day Celebration, recognising the Samsung Innovation Campus program's role in developing emerging tech talent.

featuredIn.title: ELIDZ STP Hosts a Successful ICT Hackathon Challenge
featuredIn.summary: Official ELIDZ press statement naming Team Code Brigaders (including Katlego) as winners of the November 2021 ICT Hackathon Challenge for a health application aimed at improving service delivery in rural public clinics. Note: the release spells the surname 'Mogoro'.

featuredIn.title: Samsung programme helps fuel the dreams of a young technologist
featuredIn.summary: A personal feature on Katlego's path into ICT, his Diploma at Walter Sisulu University, and his graduation from the first Samsung Innovation Campus cohort in South Africa.

featuredIn.title: Final-year IT students graduate in AI education thanks to WSU-Samsung partnership
featuredIn.summary: Coverage of the 2024 Samsung Innovation Campus AI graduation ceremony, where Katlego served as the main student representative for the first cohort, addressing new graduates alongside Samsung executives and Minister Stella Ndabeni-Abrahams.

featuredIn.title: Expleo SA Digital Skills Factory celebrates success in partnership with YES programme
featuredIn.summary: National tech media coverage profiling Katlego as a success story of Expleo's Digital Skills Factory initiative, run in partnership with the Youth Employment Service (YES) programme, on his transition into a qualified software developer.
